title: **🎵 MC {_bot_display_name} on da drumz!**
description: MC {_bot_display_name}, invite 'im to a voice kanal so 'e can bash out some noise for ya.
canvas_mc_description: Uze da menu to ask for tunez, check da queue, or add more noise, ya flabby humie.
canvas_mc_voice_required: Ya gotta be in a voice kanal first
add_song_title: Toss a Tune in da Bag
queue_empty: 📭 Da bag iz empty, no noise 'ere

dropdown.mc_play_description: Tell me da noise ya want and I'll bash it now
dropdown.mc_add_description: Add a tune to da end of da line
dropdown.mc_skip_description: Skip diz noise and play da next one
dropdown.mc_pause_description: Stop da noise, me ear itchez
dropdown.mc_stop_description: Stop ev'rythin' and burn da bag
dropdown.mc_queue_description: See what noisez are comin' next
dropdown.mc_clear_description: Toss all tunez in da bin
